recommendations.title: La Notte
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of an unfaithful married couple and their steadily deteriorating relationship in Milan.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Clouds
recommendations.overview: Four tales, each centered on a woman, journey inward to explore the enigmatic reality of their lives, connecting through a single narrative thread.

recommendations.title: Red Desert
recommendations.overview: In an industrializing Italian town, a married woman, rendered mentally unstable after a traffic accident, drifts into an affair with a friend of her husband.

recommendations.title: Il Grido
recommendations.overview: A sugar-refinery worker flees his Northern Italy town after a woman refuses his marriage proposal.

recommendations.title: Story of a Love Affair
recommendations.overview: A wealthy, possessive husband's investigation reignites his young wife's past love, leading them to plot against him. As obstacles fall away, their passion faces a new test.

recommendations.title: L'Eclisse

recommendations.title: The Passenger

recommendations.title: L'Avventura
recommendations.overview: Claudia and Anna join Anna's lover, Sandro, on a boat trip to a remote volcanic island. When Anna goes missing, a search is launched. In the meantime, Sandro and Claudia become involved in a romance despite Anna's disappearance, though the relationsh

recommendations.title: Zabriskie Point

recommendations.title: Cruella
